user.title: Connect to Eau du Grand Lyon
user.description: Enter your credentials for the customer portal {site_url}

error.invalid_auth: Incorrect credentials. Please check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the server. Check your network.
error.waf_blocked: Request blocked by web firewall. Increase update interval or wait.
error.api_error: API error. Check the status of the Eau du Grand Lyon service.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

init.title: Eau du Grand Lyon Options
init.description: Configure update interval, price per m³, and experimental mode.

data_description.price_entity: Optional: Select an entity (e.g. sensor.water_price) to use as the current price instead of the static value.
data_description.experimental_api: Enables new /rest/produits/ endpoints discovered in the 2026 Angular bundle: real invoices, daily estimated leaks, load curves. Automatic fallback to old endpoints is always active.

drought_alert.title: Drought Alert: Level {level}
drought_alert.description: The Rhône department is currently at the **{level}** restriction level. Water usage restrictions (watering, car washing, etc.) apply. Check the prefecture's website for more details.
